title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・夕空に響く

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature gains more confidence after her
performance in the autumn Tenno Sho. She
aspires to compete in the Arima Kinen next.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Nice Nature happens upon Tokai
Teio in the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Teio recognizes Nice Nature as a powerful
opponent, yet taunts her by saying that she
cannot win unless she goes all out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the people in the shopping district urging
her on after Teio's taunts, Nice Nature
confidently declares that she'll win the Chunichi
Shimbun Hai.
